hero.headline: Engineered systems for real-world operations.
hero.subheadline: We design and build custom software, platforms and automations so your business can run with clarity, speed and control.

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: Your operation has outgrown its tools.

spreadsheets.title: Spreadsheets running critical processes
spreadsheets.description: Orders, inventory and clients tracked by hand, in files that only one person fully understands.

visibility.title: No real-time visibility
visibility.description: You find out about problems when they're already expensive — not when the data first showed them.

keypeople.title: Everything depends on key people
keypeople.description: Processes live in someone's head. When that person is out, the operation slows down.

problem.bridge: Generic software forces you to work its way. We build systems that work yours.

services.label: What we build
services.title: Solutions built to scale
services.subtitle: From internal systems and portals to automation and decision tools — we build the software backbone that supports your operations and growth.

build.name: Vostex Build
build.description: We design and build internal systems, backends and portals around the way your business actually works — not the other way around. From operational tools to client-facing platforms, engineered to last and to grow.

intel.name: Vostex Intel
intel.description: We turn your operational data into clear decisions: dashboards, alerts and internal assistants that help your team act faster and with confidence. When AI makes a difference, we use it — but always inside robust systems.

flow.name: Vostex Flow
flow.description: We automate repetitive work and connect the tools you already use. Workflows, integrations and bots that keep your processes moving so your team can focus on what truly matters.

launch.name: Vostex Launch
launch.description: Websites, portals and digital experiences that sit on top of your systems. Clear, fast and trustworthy interfaces that help customers and teams interact with your business.

process.label: How we work
process.title: A clear process, from day one
process.subtitle: No black boxes. You know what we're building, why, and how it's going — at every step.

diagnose.title: Diagnose & map
diagnose.description: We sit down with your team and map how your operation actually runs: processes, tools, bottlenecks and data.

design.title: Design the system
design.description: We propose an architecture and a roadmap in plain language, with priorities and scope you can challenge.

build.title: Build in iterations
build.description: We ship working software in short cycles. You see progress in your real operation, not in slide decks.

launch.title: Launch & stay
launch.description: We train your team, monitor adoption and stay after launch. Systems evolve — so does our support.

portfolio.label: Our work
portfolio.title: Systems we've shipped
portfolio.subtitle: Real projects. Real impact. Businesses that moved from spreadsheets and scattered tools to software they actually own.
portfolio.tognarelli_description: Tognarelli Propiedades is a luxury real estate firm in Valdivia, Chile. We built their digital platform to connect buyers and renters with exclusive properties — houses, apartments, offices and land — through a refined, high-performance experience.
portfolio.tognarelli_feat1: Custom property portal with advanced search and filtering
portfolio.tognarelli_feat2: Premium UX designed for high-end real estate clientele
portfolio.testimonial: VOSTEX understood our business from day one. The platform reflects the level of service we want to give every client, and managing our properties is now far simpler for the team.

about.label: Who we are
about.title: The partner your business deserves
about.description: VOSTEX is a software engineering studio born from a simple belief: every business deserves technology that actually works for them. We're not just a software vendor — we're the expert mentor that walks alongside your transformation.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: We deliver what we promise, on time, and stay with you after launch.

versatility.title: Versatility
versatility.description: We adapt to different industries, company sizes and levels of digital maturity.

scalability.title: Scalability
scalability.description: What we build today supports tomorrow. Every solution is designed to grow.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: We make complex technology understandable and adoptable for non-technical users.

transformation.title: Real Transformation
transformation.description: We don't just deliver code — we change how your team works, decides and controls the operation day to day.

response.title: Answers within 24 hours
response.description: Every message gets a real response from an engineer, not an autoresponder.

support.title: Support after launch
support.description: We don't disappear at go-live. Training, monitoring and evolution are part of the job.

ownership.title: You own everything
ownership.description: Code, data and infrastructure are yours. No lock-in, no hostage systems.

clarity.title: Plain language
clarity.description: We explain technical decisions clearly, so you can actually make them with us.

about.founder: Founded by Hernán Provoste · Valdivia, Chile

contact.label: Get in touch
contact.title: Let's build something.
contact.subtitle: Tell us how your operation works today and where you want it to be. We'll map your systems and suggest a first step — no obligation.

form.name: Full name
form.message_placeholder: Tell us about your project, processes and goals.
form.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
